summary: Eight concrete items surfaced from 24 scraped HN front-page stories.
telegram_footer: 8 items surfaced | 24/24 stories scraped | history + run artifact updated

items.name: Zanagrams
items.summary: A word puzzle game where solved letters disappear as you clear the board.
items.why_included: The thread had strong playtest feedback and concrete UX suggestions from players.
items.evidence: Commenters shared solve times, praised the disappearing-board mechanic, and asked for bonus-word counters.

items.name: Librepods
items.summary: A Rust project that exposes extra AirPods features on non-Apple devices.
items.why_included: It offers practical interoperability value beyond standard Bluetooth support.
items.evidence: Commenters highlighted AI-assisted reverse engineering, multipoint support, and Apple-ecosystem lock-in.

items.name: The MUMPS 76 Primer – anniversary edition
items.summary: An anniversary primer for the classic MUMPS language/database, with runnable interpreter builds.
items.why_included: The thread mixed historical interest with a still-usable interpreter and long-lived production systems.
items.evidence: Commenters discussed Epic, IRIS, Caché, and how MUMPS systems have survived for decades.

items.name: NetSurf
items.source_story_title: Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD
items.summary: A lightweight web browser with a tiny footprint and few dependencies.
items.why_included: HN called out its OpenBSD framebuffer frontend as the practical build.
items.evidence: Commenters recommended the framebuffer frontend to avoid GTK bloat and keep builds lean.

items.name: Cory Doctorow books
items.summary: Cory Doctorow’s DRM-free ebook store and direct download formats.
items.why_included: It is a concrete author store with an explicit no-DRM policy.
items.evidence: Commenters said all of Doctorow’s books are DRM-free and linked to shop.craphound.com.

items.name: Bookshop.org DRM-free ebooks
items.summary: A Bookshop.org ebook list filtered to DRM-free titles.
items.why_included: It gives readers a direct way to find DRM-free books before checkout.
items.evidence: Commenters pointed to Bookshop’s DRM filter and noted it works well for DRM-free browsing.

items.name: Tor Books DRM-free ebooks
items.summary: Tor’s DRM-free ebook catalog and announcement page.
items.why_included: It is a mainstream publisher path to DRM-free EPUBs without Amazon lock-in.
items.evidence: HN commenters said Tor books are DRM-free and can be downloaded from major retailers.

items.name: 747: Creating the World's First Jumbo Jet and Other Adventures from a Life in Aviation
items.source_story_title: The Boeing 747 begins its final descent
items.summary: Joe Sutter’s memoir about building the Boeing 747.
items.why_included: The thread’s top book recommendation for deeper 747 history.
items.evidence: A commenter explicitly told readers to read Sutter’s book for the development stories behind the 747.
